compiled_state.title: Replace SIGPIPE-vulnerable echo|grep -q patterns in batch-2 test files
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Replace all echo|grep -q patterns with bash-native equivalents in batch-2 test files (files 27-52 alphabetically). Same flag-to-bash mapping as batch 1 (see parent epic).

## TDD Exemption
Exempt — mechanical replacement, no conditional logic change (criterion 1). Existing tests verify unchanged behavior (criterion 2).

## Files to Modify
Batch 2 files from: grep -rl 'echo.*|.*grep -q' tests/ | sort (positions 27-52)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Zero echo|grep -q patterns in batch-2 files
  Verify: test "$(grep -c 'echo.*|.*grep -q' $(git diff --name-only) 2>/dev/null)" -eq 0
- [ ] All modified test files pass
  Verify: for f in $(git diff --name-only); do bash "$f" 2>&1 | tail -3; done
- [ ] No syntax errors
  Verify: for f in $(git diff --name-only); do bash -n "$f" || exit 1; done

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Replacements complete for all 26 batch-2 files ✓
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: All 26 test files pass (0 failures across all suites) ✓
